area: Runner sync / framework temp hotfix lane
finding: After a framework temp-claim hotfix commits source changes, the frozen runner becomes stale and `ATM_RETAIN_RELEASE_ARTIFACTS=1 npm run build` requires a broker runner-sync queue-head reservation. The required enqueue path rejects `ATM-FRAMEWORK-TEMP-*` owners as `task-missing`, leaving no legal runner-sync path for urgent framework hotfixes or post-checkpoint release sync work that is intentionally scoped by framework-mode rather than a normal active task ledger.
expectedBehavior: Runner-sync enqueue/admission should accept a valid live framework temp claim as an active steward owner for `ATM-FRAMEWORK-TEMP-*` work, while continuing to reject ordinary missing, terminal, or stale task ids. The admission failure should also surface a runnable enqueue command instead of a prose-only requiredCommand.
evidenceOrRepro: On 2026-07-20 Asia/Taipei, after commit 5839f138ea3ecc0c6238143b58de8bc4422616ba, `ATM_RETAIN_RELEASE_ARTIFACTS=1 npm run build` failed with `ATM_RUNNER_SYNC_QUEUE_HEAD_REQUIRED`; `broker runner-sync enqueue --task ATM-FRAMEWORK-TEMP-codex-captain --actor codex-captain --sealed-source-sha 5839f138ea3ecc0c6238143b58de8bc4422616ba --surface release/atm-onefile/atm.mjs --surface release/atm-root-drop --json` then failed with `ATM_RUNNER_SYNC_ENQUEUE_TASK_INVALID` because the temp claim has no `.atm/history/tasks/<id>.json` ledger.
followUp: Closed by ATM-GOV-0230 disposition: `runner-sync-framework-temp-hotfix.test.ts` verifies a live `ATM-FRAMEWORK-TEMP-*` lock can enqueue and satisfy runner-sync admission without a task JSON, while missing framework temp locks and ordinary missing/terminal task ids remain rejected.
